payload.description:
Implementation task for the current-medication policy and Medication Review composite fix in SelectQuote HCS Medium-Risk.

Acceptance criteria:
- Update live score versions in Plexus for the affected Medication Review scores.
- Validate guideline markdown before pushing guideline-bearing changes.
- Verify direct predictions after the change.
- Record final promoted or non-promoted state in Kanbus.
payload.title: Update live Medication Review split-score rubric and composite logic
